## Checklist

- [ ] One logical change (split larger PRs)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behaviour changes (`pytest` passes locally)
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] New public functions have NumPy-style docstrings with at least one example
- [ ] New numerical defaults cite a peer-reviewed source
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Stays within Africa scope (or has explicit reasoning to extend)
